Bamyan

The crown jewel of Afghan tourism, home to UNESCO Buddhas and sapphire lakes.

Plan a Visit
CENTRAL

About Bamyan

Afghanistan’s premier cultural destination. Stand before the towering empty niches of the destroyed 6th-century Buddhas and explore the sapphire-blue travertine lakes of Band-e-Amir National Park. Known for its cool climate and the red fortress of Shahr-e Zohak, it is the spiritual and scenic heart of the Hazarajat.

Dragon Valley

Bamyan

Chehel Burj Bamyan Ruins

Year-round

Central Afghanistan Discovery

Ancient cities, mountain valleys, and everyday Afghan life—planned safely and guided locally.

Apr-Jun

Afghanistan Discovery Tour Spring

The Discovery Tour is a balanced overview of Afghanistan’s highlights, combining major cities, cultural landmarks, and natural scenery.

From $1,890 9 days
Sep-Nov

The Discovery Tour is a balanced overview of Afghanistan’s highlights, combining major cities, cultural landmarks, and natural scenery.

From $1,950 9 days
Jan-Mar

Bamyan Skiing Tour

The Bamyan Skiing Tour is a unique winter expedition into Afghanistan’s central highlands, centered around backcountry skiing.

From $1,300 5 days
Dec-Mar

Buzkashi Expedition

The Buzkashi Expedition takes you deep into northern Afghanistan to witness and experience the country’s most iconic traditional sport.

From $2,450 10 days
Year-round

Custom Expedition

The Custom Expedition allows travelers to design a personalized itinerary anywhere in Afghanistan.

From $3,500 15 days
Year-round

Photography Tour

The Photography Tour is designed for travelers who want to capture Afghanistan’s landscapes, architecture, and people.

From $2,850 12 days
Year-round

Scientific Expeditions

Scientific Expeditions are designed for researchers, academics, and documentary teams seeking logistical support.

From $4,500 14 days
Nov-Mar

Winter Circuit

The Winter Circuit connects several winter-accessible destinations across Afghanistan, combining cultural exploration with snowy scenery.

From $2,100 12 days
Jun-Sep

Summer Circuit

A loop designed for the hottest months, focusing on high-altitude national parks and northern strongholds.

From $1,950 8 days
Year-round

A deep dive into the historical heart of Afghanistan, crossing the Hindu Kush.
